label: 한국 웹툰풍 · 파스텔 클린
style_prompt: Korean webtoon style illustration, clean lineart, smooth pastel gradients, soft rim light, high readability, minimal texture, modern mobile webtoon look, expressive face, consistent character design, crisp edges
negative_style_prompt: oil painting texture, heavy brush strokes, gritty noise, messy lines, watercolor bleed, low contrast, blurry

label: 한국 웹툰풍 · 연재 중간컷
style_prompt: Korean commercial serialized webtoon episode panel style, ordinary panels from the middle of a vertically scrolling Korean webtoon episode. The image must feel like a casual screenshot from a real serialized episode, not an Instagram card, not a poster, not a card-news design, and not a standalone illustration. Use dialogue-oriented functional storytelling composition, casual camera angles, slightly awkward crops, mid-conversation reaction shots, practical mobile readability, quiet everyday atmosphere, understated slice-of-life mood, lightweight productivity-oriented digital linework, simple readable silhouettes, simplified faces and eyes, minimal eyelashes and lips, simplified hands, hair grouped into simple masses, restrained hair highlights, simplified clothing wrinkles, soft flat cel shading, very subtle secondary shadows, muted dusty colors, gray-beige calm palette, restrained deep black, simple readable backgrounds, spacious empty areas, low information density, fast serialized webtoon production feeling, non-heroic staging, non-promotional composition. Prefer speech bubbles and small narration boxes over big headline typography. Korean text only when required and kept short readable inside speech bubbles or small webtoon narration boxes.
negative_style_prompt: card news layout, infographic layout, giant headline typography, presentation slide, social media template, poster-like composition, splash art, promotional illustration, key visual, webnovel cover, webtoon cover illustration, YouTube thumbnail composition, Instagram art poster, novel cover, game illustration, trading card art, concept art, visual novel CG, idol composition, glamour shot, centered heroic pose, dramatic promotional framing, extreme perspective, exaggerated foreshortening, dynamic action pose, cinematic battle framing, grand composition, overly calculated poster framing, painterly fantasy illustration, glossy anime style, semi-realistic painting, highly rendered anime style, dramatic cinematic lighting, bloom, lens flare, rim light, spotlight, volumetric lighting, glossy skin, sparkling anime eyes, realistic skin texture, photorealism, 3D rendering, ultra detailed, excessive detail, heavy gradients, deep shadows, high contrast lighting, over-rendered face, too many hair strands, complex hair rendering, excessive hair highlights, detailed pores, realistic fabric texture, complicated background, overly polished illustration finish, beautiful standalone illustration, character photoshoot feeling, watermark, logo, title typography
preview_hint: 디시 공유 프롬프트 참고. 표지/일러스트 느낌을 누르고 실제 한국 연재 웹툰 중간 컷처럼 담백하게 뽑는 스타일. 대화형 인스타툰/웹툰에 추천.
